Your email list is one of your business’s most valuable assets. In this lesson, you’ll be introduced to the strategy behind email marketing and the breakdown of “value” emails.

Don’t forget… click here to download your Mastermind Business System Resource Guide and follow along!

Learn how to bring your opt-ins from lead magnet to your offer in a valuable way here!

Learn how to efficiently write and schedule your emails using the Business Hub here!
